SubLayerProcessing.SQLScript: SELECT DISTINCT  XR.ICD AS icd ,IC.CodeType AS icdCodeType ,IY.EffectiveYear AS icdEffectiveYear ,HC.hccNumber ,HC.hccVersion ,HC.hccType ,HY.EffectiveYear AS hccEffectiveYear ,XR.isPrimary ,XR.EffectiveDateStart AS effectiveStartDate ,XR.EffectiveDateEnd AS effectiveEndDate ,hash(concat(IfNull(XR.ICD, "  ") , "| ",IfNull(IC.CodeType, "  ") , "| ",IfNull(IY.EffectiveYear, "  ") , "| ",IfNull(HC.hccNumber, "  ") , "| ",IfNull(HC.hccVersion, "  ") , "| ",IfNull(HC.hccType, "  ") , "| ",IfNull(HY.EffectiveYear, "  ") , "| ",IfNull(XR.IsPrimary,false) , "| ",IfNull(XR.EffectiveDateStart, "  ") , "| ",IfNull(XR.EffectiveDateEnd, "  "))) AS icdHCCKey  FROM HCCICDDatasetXref XR JOIN ICDDataset IC ON IC.ICDDatasetID = XR.ICDDatasetID JOIN ICDEffectiveYear IY  ON IC.ICDEffectiveYearID = IY.ICDEffectiveYearID JOIN HCCDataset HC  ON XR.HCCDatasetID = HC.HCCDatasetID AND UPPER(HC.HCCType) IN ('COMM', 'ESRD') JOIN HCCEffectiveYear HY  ON HC.HCCEffectiveYearID = HY.HCCEffectiveYearID  ORDER BY icd ,effectiveStartDate ,effectiveEndDate ,HC.hccNumber
SubLayerProcessing.MergeScript: MERGE INTO DestinationTable t USING (SELECT * FROM tempSQLScript)s ON IfNull(s.icd, " ")=IfNull(t.icd, " ")  AND IfNull(s.icdCodeType, " ") = IfNull(t.icdCodeType, " ")  AND IfNull(s.icdEffectiveYear, " ") = IfNull(t.icdEffectiveYear, " ")   AND IfNull(s.hccNumber, " ") = IfNull(t.hccNumber, " ")   AND IfNull(s.hccVersion, " ") = IfNull(t.hccVersion, " ")   AND IfNull(s.hccType, " ") = IfNull(t.hccType, " ")   AND IfNull(s.hccEffectiveYear, " ") = IfNull(t.hccEffectiveYear, " ")  AND IfNull(s.effectiveStartDate, " ") = IfNull(t.effectiveStartDate, " ")  AND IfNull(s.effectiveEndDate, " ") = IfNull(t.effectiveEndDate, " ")  WHEN MATCHED AND t.icdHCCKey <> s.icdHCCKey  THEN UPDATE SET  icdHCCKey = s.icdHCCKey  ,icd = s.icd  ,icdCodeType = s.icdCodeType  ,icdEffectiveYear = s.icdEffectiveYear  ,hccNumber = s.hccNumber  ,hccVersion = s.hccVersion  ,hccType = s.hccType  ,hccEffectiveYear = s.hccEffectiveYear  ,effectiveStartDate = s.effectiveStartDate  ,effectiveEndDate = s.effectiveEndDate  ,isPrimary = s.isPrimary  WHEN NOT MATCHED  THEN INSERT (icdHCCKey  ,icd  ,icdCodeType  ,icdEffectiveYear  ,hccNumber  ,hccVersion ,hccType  ,hccEffectiveYear  ,effectiveStartDate  ,effectiveEndDate ,isPrimary)  VALUES (s.icdHCCKey  ,s.icd  ,s.icdCodeType  ,s.icdEffectiveYear  ,s.hccNumber  ,s.hccVersion ,s.hccType  ,s.hccEffectiveYear  ,s.effectiveStartDate  ,s.effectiveEndDate  ,s.isPrimary)
